task: place the black bowl in the gray plate
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A black bowl sits on a gray plate. The bowl is a rigid, concave object; the plate is a flat, circular surface. STRATEGY - First, grasp the bowl from its body to lift it. Then, transport it over the plate. Finally, place it gently onto the plate's center to ensure stability. Failure modes include dropping the bowl during transport or misplacing it on the plate. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the bowl's body for initial contact. Step 2: Grasp the bowl's body for a secure hold. Step 3: Transport the bowl above the plate. Step 4: Place the bowl onto the plate's center.**
Goal: on(black_bowl, gray_plate); stable(black_bowl)
Scene: black_bowl, gray_plate, table
Step 1: reach(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the body of the black bowl
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_bowl, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_bowl) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(black_bowl)
  affordance_region: the body of the black bowl
  contact: holding(black_bowl) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_bowl)
Step 3: transport(black_bowl -> gray_plate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the gray plate
  spatial: above(black_bowl, gray_plate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_bowl)
  done_when: above(black_bowl, gray_plate, 0.05)
Step 4: place(black_bowl -> gray_plate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the gray plate
  contact: surface_contact(black_bowl, gray_plate) [completion]; released(black_bowl) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_bowl) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_bowl, gray_plate) AND released(black_bowl)
<END_OF_PLAN>
